<!--interwikis from wikidata-->
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->
{{Expand Japanese}}

{{Infobox religious building
| Name = Kawara Shrine
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| image = File:Kawaharajinja1.JPG
| location = Izumi 1559, Saha-cho, [[Ise]], {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}, Japan
| coordinates = {{Coord|35.15125|N|136.94413889|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
| Map = Japan Mie
| deity = [[Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto|Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto]]
| type = {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor Rank), {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} auxiliary shrine (*sessha*)
| Established = Before 927 CE (Enchō 5)
| Main Hall = [[Shinmei-zukuri]]
| Other Names = 
| festival = 
| Rituals = [[Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Harvest Festival)
| location = {{ill|Kawana-hommachi|qid=Q26160574|1=Kawana-hommachi}}
| architecture_style = {{ill|Shinmei-zukuri|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}}
}}


== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==

'''Kawara Shrine (Naikū) (Q3194327)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

== Shikinaisha (式内社) ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! District !! Name !! Funding&nbsp;category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same&nbsp;as !! Co-ords !! Shrine&nbsp;DB
|-
| RONSHA || {{ill|Kawara Shrine (Naikū)|lt=Kawahara Shrine|en|Kawahara Shrine|ja|川原神社|commons|Category:Kawahara-jinja|fr|Kawahara-jinja|qid=Q3194327|1=Kawahara Shrine}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || — || — || {{ill|Kaharano Shrine|lt=Kaharano Shrine|qid=Q135039553|1=Kaharano Shrine}} || {{coord|35.151250|136.944139|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181448 DB]
|}==Notes==
<references group="lower-alpha"/>
[[co:commons:Category:Kawahara-jinja]]
[[da:d:Q3194327]]
[[Kawahara Shrine]]
[[fr:Kawahara-jinja]]
[[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]]
[[Category:Buildings and structures in Showa-ku, Nagoya]]
[[Category:History of Shōwa-ku, Nagoya]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
[[Category:Setsumatsusha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Ise Province]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]]
[[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise City]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
{{wikidata link|Q3194327}}[[Category:Need translation]]
==Merged content from enwiki==
{{Short description|Shinto shrine in Aichi Prefecture, Japan}}
{{Unreferenced|date=March 2025}}
{{Infobox religious building
| name = {{nihongo|'''Kawahara Shrine'''|川原神社|Kawahara-jinja}}
| image = Kawaharajinja2.JPG
| caption = Kawahara Shrine
| map_type = Japan
| map_alt = 
| coordinates = {{Coord|35|9|4.5|N|136|56|38.9|E|display=title,inline}}
| map_relief  = 
| map_size = 
| map_caption = 
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| type = 
| deity = 
| founded_by = 
| established = 
| date_destroyed = 
| location = [[Shōwa-ku]], [[Nagoya]], [[Aichi Prefecture]], Japan
| website = 
| architecture_style = 
| festival = 
| leadership = 
}}
[[File:Kawaharajinja1.JPG|thumb|''Haiden'' main hall]]
The {{nihongo|'''Kawahara Shrine'''|川原神社|Kawahara-jinja}} is a [[Shinto shrine]] and Buddhist [[Benten-dō]] located in [[Shōwa-ku]], [[Nagoya]], [[Aichi Prefecture]], Japan.

The construction date of the shrine is not clear, it is assumed however that is appeared around 1000. The shrine underwent a number of reconstructions and renovations, the last one being in 1998. There is a pond with turtles that surround the shrine.

Since Buddhism and Shinto were closely intertwined, the shrine was also dedicated to [[Benzaiten]]. Therefore, it is better known as the "Benten of Kawana" rather than "Kawahara Shrine".

The nearest [[Nagoya Municipal Bus]] stop is "Bentenmae" on the No. 18.

{{Shinto shrine}}

[[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagoya]]
[[Category:Shōwa-ku]]
[[Category:Buddhist temples in Nagoya]]


{{shinto-stub}}
